stemHtml: In relation to PBN operational approvals in accordance with the European Regulations on Air Operations, which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The PBN specifications that require operational approval are MCTOM (Maximum Certified Take-Off Mass)-dependent.
options.b: The PBN specifications that require operational approval are operator-dependent.
options.c: Only certain PBN specifications require an operational approval.
options.d: All PBN specifications require an operational approval.
